title: MythLib
description: Cross-Platform library for minecraft mod development.
body:
**Please note that this library is in its early stages and is likely to change drastically in the furute.**

## Description
Cross-Platform library for minecraft mod development. Based on Architectury API, ResourcefulLib and Botarium.

MythLib was planned to be a library used for my projects but I think it can be useful for many developers when creating mods for Fabric + Forge. 

## Features
- Registry
- Networking
- Fluid and Energy API compatible with any other mod.
